title: Raytracing Engine
description: Vulkan-based raytracing engine demonstrating real-time signal processing and performance optimization—skills directly applicable to latency-critical BCI systems. Features GPU-accelerated computation and noise reduction algorithms essential for neural signal processing.

title: Majin - Game Engine
description: Modern 3D engine built in C++23 demonstrating systems architecture, real-time constraints, and cross-platform development—foundational skills for building robust BCI software that must run reliably in clinical environments.

title: Chess Engine
description: Decision-making system under strict resource constraints (1024 tokens). Demonstrates optimization techniques and algorithmic efficiency relevant to embedded BCI systems with limited computational resources and power budgets.

title: FEP Chatbot
description: Production ML system demonstrating deployment, monitoring, and reliability—essential skills for clinical BCI applications. Azure OpenAI integration shows experience with ML infrastructure at scale, critical for real-world neurotechnology deployment.
